entity.summary: Hyperliquid-based token launch and exchange protocol supporting bonding-curve purchases and sales, transition to decentralized-exchange liquidity, post-bond liquidity-provider fees, and protocol staking distributions.
entity.notes: The current first-party application remains reachable. Current on-chain tracking reads LiquidLaunch purchase, sale, bond-fee, post-bond fee-claim, and staking-reward events from identified Hyperliquid contracts. Confidence remains medium because public first-party documentation is limited and the detailed transaction evidence is independently maintained.

evidence.title: LiquidLaunch official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application establishes the LiquidLaunch identity and active public product surface on Hyperliquid.

evidence.title: LiquidLaunch on-chain fees and volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current-running adapter tracks Hyperliquid TokensPurchased, TokensSold, BondFeeCollected, FeesClaimed, and RewardAdded events for the protocol's identified contracts, supporting active exchange and post-bond liquidity classification.
